'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 24''' is the twenty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 12]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Comlink/Legends|Comlinks]]
*[[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros's]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]]
